title: High Ancient Clans
content:
The 
High Ancient Clans
 are the nine major clans of the 
Outer Realm
. Many of the senior members of these clans make up the members of the 
Sovereign Council
. They are the authority directly below the 
Sovereign
 and the 
Eight Ancient Imperial Concubines
.

Members
[
]

Sealing Extermination Clan
 (Leader)

Leaf - 
Tattoo Clan

Flame - 
Fire Sparrow Clan

Crescent Moon - 
Moon Devourer Clan

Lightning - 
Scatter Thunder Clan

Black Dragon -

Blue Hair - 
Blue Silk Clan

Green Wolf - 
Esteemed Heavenly Wolf Clan
